name: BindPropertyNameEditor
summary: The BindPropertyNameEditor class provides a user interface for selecting a property for the attribute binding.

constructors.name: BindPropertyNameEditor
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BindPropertyNameEditor class

methods.name: EditValue
methods.summary: Edits the specified object's value using the editor style indicated by the GetEditStyle method.

methods.name: GetEditStyle
methods.summary: Gets the editor style used by the EditValue method.
